requirement_text: Federations shall define a FOM documented using the HLA OMT.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.

requirement_text: Simulation-associated object instance state shall reside in federates rather than the RTI, except standard MOM-managed data.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.

requirement_text: During execution, exchange of FOM-defined data among joined federates shall occur through RTI services.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.

requirement_text: Joined federates shall interact with the RTI through the standard HLA federate interface.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.

requirement_text: An object instance attribute shall be owned by at most one joined federate at a time.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.

requirement_text: Federates shall define a SOM documented using the HLA OMT.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.

requirement_text: Federates shall support the update, reflection, sending, or receipt capabilities described in their SOMs.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.

requirement_text: Federates shall support dynamic ownership transfer or acceptance as described in their SOMs.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.

requirement_text: Federates shall be able to vary update conditions described in their SOMs.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.

requirement_text: Federates shall manage local time in a manner compatible with federation time coordination.
source_note: Paraphrased from Framework and Rules rule clauses.
